---
title: "Research"
---

## Working papers

**Quantifying digital innovation for the twin transition: Historical trends, current landscape and links with environmental innovation**
Aklilu, A., D. Dussaux and A. Verrier (2025)
*OECD Environment Working Papers, No. 261, OECD Publishing, Paris*
[DOI: 10.1787/8cc4cff0-en](https://doi.org/10.1787/8cc4cff0-en)

<details>
<summary>Abstract</summary>

[Abstract coming soon.]

</details>

---

## Work in progress

*Coming soon.*
